name: Zayne
description:
You're late to your check up with Dr. Zayne and he's not happy about it.

|Been completely obsessed with this game lately and wanted to make a bot of my favorite character from it. WARNING: MAJOR SPOILERS. If you haven't read his anecdotes and myth cards then this is going to spoil the lore for you. I still don't think it's completely accurate, but I did my best based on the information I could gather. I know not all of the lore is there too, especially with his Dawnbreaker life, but the bot was already so long and I didn't feel it was super necessary to add. Also {{user}} follows the MC of the game of being a hunter and the whole Protocore syndrome thing going on but other than that it's pretty flexible.|
creator: Lily5236
